item.title: Wedgewood Houston Farmers' Market
item.description:
Wednesday, July 1, 2026 at 9 AM

Location: Wedgewood area, Houston, TX

Weekly farmers market in the Wedgewood neighborhood, May through October.

From Wedgewood Houston Farmers' Market

Event details

item.title: Unwind & Win at the Hyatt!
item.description:
Thursday, July 2, 2026 at 4 PM

Location: Black Gold Bar, 13210 Katy Fwy, Houston, TX, 77079, United States

Looking for the perfect spot to transition from the workday to the weekend? Join the Energy Corridor community for a sophisticated happy hour at the Hyatt Regency Houston West. Experience the elegant atmosphere of Black Gold Bar; it’s the perfect opportunity to connect with District leaders and professionals in a relaxed, beautiful setting. Beyond the great drinks and atmosphere, they’re bringing the community together with some exciting weekly perks: Weekly Prize Drawings: Every Thursday at 6:45 PM. Monthly Grand Prize: A lucky winner receives a 1-night weekend stay! Vendor Showcase Corner: Discover and support local District businesses.   Come for the drinks, stay for the connections! When: Thursdays – 4:00 PM – 7:00 PM Location: Black Gold Bar | 13210 Katy Fwy, Houston, TX 77079 Download the Happy Hour Menu

From Energy Corridor Farmers Market

Event details

item.title: Shop Local Market
item.description:
Saturday, July 4, 2026 at 10 AM

Location: TX

Discover one-of-a-kind gifts, handmade art, lush plants, craft coffee, sweet treats, and more at Shop Local Market’s weekend pop-up!

From Houston Farmers Market

item.title: Mariachi at the Market with Alamo Tamales
item.description:
Sunday, July 26, 2026 at 12 PM

Location: The Houston Farmers Market, 2520 Airline Drive, Houston, TX, 77009, United States

Enjoy live mariachi music at the Houston Farmers Market on the last Sunday of every month from 12–2 PM, presented in partnership with Alamo Tamales.

From Houston Farmers Market

item.title: Board of Directors Meeting
item.description:
Friday, August 14, 2026 at 8:30 AM

Location: Energy Corridor District, 777 North Eldridge Parkway, Suite 270, Houston, TX, 77079, United States

The Energy Corridor District® Board of Directors meet every second Friday of the month at 8:30 a.m. Meetings are held at: Energy Corridor District 777 North Eldridge Parkway, Suite 270, Houston, Texas 77079 Board of Directors Meeting dates/times are subject to change. Call 281-759-3800 to confirm meeting schedules. View Meeting Documents here.

From Energy Corridor Farmers Market

Event details

item.title: Unified Topgolf Pro-Am (Houston-Katy)
item.description:
Friday, September 18, 2026 at 10 AM

Location: Topgolf-Katy, 1030 Memorial Brook Blvd, Houston, TX 77084, Houston, 77084

The Unified Topgolf Pro-Am is one of the most exciting and meaningful community partnership events hosted by Special Olympics Texas, bringing together athletes, families, coaches, volunteers, corporate partners, and local business leaders for an unforgettable day of golf, laughter, connection, and community impact. Each bay includes a Special Olympics Texas athlete paired alongside five golfers, creating a truly unique experience where relationships, memories, and meaningful moments are built throughout the day. From friendly competition and team spirit to incredible conversations and shared experiences, the event is designed to bring people together in a fun and welcoming environment while directly supporting local athletes and programs. Proceeds from the Unified Topgolf Pro-Am help provide year-round sports training, competitions, health initiatives, leadership development, and educational opportunities for children, teenagers, and adults with intellectual disabilities throughout the greater Houston area. As the event continues growing each year, the Unified Topgolf Pro-Am has quickly become a tremendous opportunity for organizations and community members to make a real impact while being part of something incredibly energetic, uplifting, and memorable. For more information regarding sponsorship opportunities, team entries, volunteer involvement, or sponsorship opportunities, please reach out to Jared Kossover, Strategic Partnerships Manager with Special Olympics Texas Jared Kossover E: jkossover@sotx.org C: 737-867-9659

From Energy Corridor Farmers Market

Event details
